title: RUSTINS Red Oxide Metal Primer 1L
features: Effective Rust Prevention for Metal Surfaces: Rustins Red Oxide Metal Primer provides an optimal base coat that prevents rust and corrosion, prolonging the life of your metalwork
Strong Adhesion for Superior Topcoat Finish: Designed for ferrous metals, this primer offers high adhesion, ensuring your topcoat stays intact while enhancing the overall finish and durability

Quick-Drying Formula for Time-Saving Application: With a fast-drying composition, this primer allows for efficient completion of projects, whether applied by brush, roller, or spray; ADD TO BASKET now
Versatile Primer for Indoor and Outdoor Use: Suitable for gates, railings, machinery, and other metal structures, Rustins Red Oxide Metal Primer delivers reliable protection in various environments
Available in Convenient Sizes for Any Project: Choose from a range of sizes to suit small DIY projects or large-scale industrial applications, ensuring you have the right amount for your needs
